summary.sosovalue: Neutral to positive. Community primarily shares SoSoValue data (e.g., ETF flows, BTC holdings, liquidations) and praises its analytics, research tools, and AI-powered insights for informed trading. Mentions in news aggregation and promotional contexts dominate, with no strong negativity.
summary.sodex: Mostly positive with minor criticism. Users highlight on-chain trading, low fees, CEX-like feel, new perps listings (e.g., $CL), and rewards like SoPoints. One complaint about high trading fees not displaying clearly on position close.
summary.ssi: Limited mentions, neutral-positive. Brief positive note on SSI protocol for transparent, stable on-chain passive investment reducing volatility via diversified portfolios.
